data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for auto-sync when connection is restored.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of auto-sync functionality when the connection is restored. However, the provided evidence does not include any details or confirmation regarding the implementation of this feature. The absence of specific API endpoints or evidence of the system's behavior in this scenario indicates a lack of clarity on whether this requirement is met.
gaps: No evidence of auto-sync functionality when connection is restored.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for auto-sync functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the system automatically syncs data when the connection is restored.
